abilities.name: Brilliant Guide
abilities.text: Once per activation. After a model within 6" gains a friendly Brilliance token, this model may move it up to 2". Then, this model may remove the Brilliance token to move it an additional 2".

abilities.name: Don't Bite the Hand
abilities.text: When attacking this model, enemies with a friendly Brilliance token may not cheat.

actions.name: Despicable Promise
actions.effects: Target gains a Brilliance token. If this action receives a raise, make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Come Play at My Table
triggers.text: Place the target in base contact with an ally within 6" of itself.

triggers.name: Chill
triggers.text: Models damaged by this action gain a Slow token.

triggers.name: Inner Glow
triggers.text: Allies within 4" of this model heal 1 and may gain a Brilliance token.

actions.name: The Invisible Hand
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per turn. Target a marker.
actions.effects: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target, then remove the target.

triggers.name: Inner Glow
triggers.text: Allies within 4" of this model heal 1 and may gain a Brilliance token.
